heading: Today
text: Early clouds clearing for sunshine, mixing with afternoon clouds.  Highs in the 20s to low 30s north, in the 30s south.  Winds west near 10 mph, a few gusts to 25 mph, diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Tonight
text: Periods of clouds.  Lows in the teens to near 20 north, 20 to 25 south.  Winds light and variable, becoming south near 10 mph from the Green Mountains west.

heading: Thursday
text: Periods of clouds, with a chance for a few spotty snow or rain showers in the St. Lawrence Valley.  Highs in the upper 30s to low 40s.  Winds becoming south near 10 mph, increasing to 10 to 15 mph from the Green Mountains west, with a few gusts to 25 mph.
